hero.description: KOTA answers restaurant calls during rush—takes orders and reservations, then sends confirmed details to your team via Cloud Printer or SMS.
hero.roiMetric: The average restaurant misses 30% of peak-hour calls, costing over $1,200 weekly. KOTA automatically captures that lost revenue.

socialProof.title: Trusted by busy restaurants to handle the dinner rush

problems: Staff stuck on the phone instead of serving customers
Wrong or missed items leading to refunds and bad reviews
Only one call can be handled at a time
Language barriers cause misunderstandings and slow service
outcomes: Staff stays focused on in-person service
problemOutcome.bottomText: No POS integration required. Orders delivered via Cloud Printer or SMS.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple call handling that fits your current workflow.
howItWorks.description: No POS integration required. Orders are delivered via Cloud Printer or SMS.

steps.title: Answer
steps.description: KOTA picks up instantly when staff is busy

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Repeats back items and details to reduce mistakes

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: Prints a kitchen ticket via Cloud Printer (or texts your team)

howItWorks.setupInstruction: Setup is fast: forward your phone line → choose delivery → go live.

useCases.subtitle: Handle every type of call that comes into your restaurant, organized seamlessly.

features.title: Phone Orders
features.description: Captures items, modifiers, and customer info—confirmed with 100% accuracy.

features.title: Reservations & Waitlist
features.description: Books reservations and manages waitlist requests dynamically.

features.title: Menu & Allergens Q&A
features.description: Answers complex allergen and ingredient questions instantly based on your custom menu data.

features.title: Hours, Location & Parking
features.description: Stops repetitive logistical calls during rush hour.

features.title: Catering Inquiries
features.description: Collects group sizes, dietary restrictions, and dates, routing them directly to your event manager.

features.title: Order Status & Timing
features.description: Eliminates 'is it ready yet?' calls. Gives real-time status updates based on your prep times.

safety.description: KOTA doesn't guess. Smart guardrails ensure orders are perfectly captured, or instantly escalated to your team.

features.title: Human Fallback
features.description: Handoffs to staff when confidence is low or complex questions arise.

features.title: Full Transparency
features.description: Every call is transcribed and logged. Review exactly what was said.

features.title: Custom Guardrails
features.description: Enforce strict rules for 86'd items, custom hours, and required upsells.

languages.description: Never lose a massive catering order to a language barrier again. KOTA seamlessly detects and switches languages instantly.
